summary: All 4 deliverables verified end-to-end. 26/26 backend pytest cases pass (100%). Auth (JWT), /api/integrations/health (postproxy, mailersend, apify, shopify, emergent_llm, canva, slack_alerts + _meta.alerts), Canva OAuth router (status/connect/callback/disconnect/templates/autofill mounted at /api/canva/*), postproxy publish refactor (URL https://api.postproxy.dev/api/posts, X-API-Key first then Bearer, profile_group_id=60FLY0), MailerSend wiring in scheduler (https://api.mailersend.com/v1/email, Bearer auth, graceful no-op when FROM email empty), and Slack flip detection w/ 30-min dedupe scheduled */5min all working as specified.

minor.issue: auth_header field in response is computed via a brittle expression `headers_variants` keys lookup that always falls through to the fallback string 'X-API-Key or Authorization' (cosmetic only — does not affect publishing). Suggest using a tracked variable for which header succeeded.

action_items: (Optional cosmetic) Track which header variant succeeded in postproxy_diagnose response instead of the brittle expression on line ~388 of server.py.
(Reminder) User still needs to provide MAILERSEND_FROM_EMAIL and SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL in .env before email/Slack alerts will actually fire — current behaviour gracefully no-ops as designed.
Frontend M6 Canva UI (connect button, brand templates picker, autofill in Creative Agent) was not requested for testing — main agent should verify visually once UI is built.
critical_code_review_comments: agents.postproxy_publish() correctly POSTs to {POSTPROXY_BASE}/posts with profile_group_id from env (60FLY0) and tries X-API-Key before Bearer — verified by static src check.

scheduler.send_email() correctly uses MailerSend REST API (api.mailersend.com/v1/email) with Bearer auth and gracefully returns False (no crash) when MAILERSEND_FROM_EMAIL is empty — verified live via /api/notifications/test returning {sent: false}.

scheduler.check_health_and_alert() implements 30-min dedupe via ALERT_DEDUPE_MINUTES env var and persists per-service state in db.health_state. Slack/Discord posts are gated by webhook env vars (empty → no-op).
build_scheduler() accepts optional health_fn parameter; server.on_startup passes _collect_integrations_health and registers a CronTrigger(minute='*/5') job — verified.

canva.py implements full PKCE OAuth (s256), persists tokens in db.canva_tokens, auto-refreshes expired access tokens, and exposes status/connect/callback/disconnect/templates/autofill — all routes reachable under /api/canva/*.
/api/integrations/health returns _meta.alerts with flips/alerted/deduped lists; on repeat calls no false flips were generated; resend key fully removed from response payload.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py (rewrote as comprehensive pytest suite covering iteration 2 deliverables)
test_credentials: Admin: bagnshopstore@gmail.com / BagnShop@2026 (seeded on startup from .env). JWT returned by /api/auth/login is valid for 30 days.
seed_data_creation: None — used the auto-seeded admin/brand/competitors. No TEST_ prefixed data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_backend.py has 7 test classes (Auth, IntegrationsHealth, Canva, Postproxy, MailerSend, SlackAlerts, Regression). Run: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_backend.py -v. Postproxy diagnose currently returns HTTP 200 — if upstream API changes auth requirements this test may need updating. Canva templates list is intentionally NOT live-tested because OAuth requires user click — only the 401 'Canva not connected' path is asserted.
rca of the issue: No bugs found this iteration. All 4 deliverables (postproxy refactor, MailerSend swap, Canva M6 backend, Slack flip alerts) pass live + static checks.
